goal: Restructure and organize the repository by consolidating logic under quantumtrade/ (canonical), while keeping backward compatibility via re-export stubs.

strategy.compatibility: Convert old top-level packages into re-export-only stubs instead of deleting modules immediately.
strategy.import_policy: New code imports from quantumtrade; legacy imports remain functional via stubs.

notes: Repo already has both old and new structures. This plan consolidates without breaking run.py/GUI/Telegram by providing stubs first.
